name: gt20b_declaxis_dfirst
drl:
rule "R0"
no-loop
salience -10
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    delete($p);
end
rule "R1"
no-loop
when
    $p : P($x : f0, f1 == 0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, false));
    $p.setF1(1);
    update($p);
end
rule "R2"
when
    LK2($v : f0)
then
end
rule "R3"
salience -1
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
then
end
